$comment: Augment Code — a MERGE SNIPPET: merge the 'hooks' key into ~/.augment/settings.json (user) or <workspace>/.augment/settings.json (project; the cascade is system -> workspace -> user). PascalCase events, same matcher+hooks[] entry shape as Claude Code (docs.augmentcode.com/cli/hooks, verified 2026-07-15: SessionStart injects context via stdout — the ONE file-copy platform whose inject channel is doc-verified, so the plain Claude-Code stdout shape via the trailing 'FileCopy' argument matches by the book). PostToolUse journals every tool call (no narrowing matcher: CoalHearth records spawns and files both); its payload field casing is unverified — the reader probes both. Adjust C:/path/to/CoalHearth in every command. Tier: wired — built + hermetically tested vs the primary docs; NO live Augment session has run this wiring yet.
